# CyberWorld Builders
> Custom software, AI automation, and full-stack web development for service businesses.

## About
CyberWorld Builders is a software engineering firm led by Jay Long, based in Guntersville, Alabama. We build custom software, marketing automation systems, and AI-powered tools for service businesses — plumbers, contractors, agencies, and regional companies ready to grow.

We are Top Rated Plus on Upwork with a 100% Job Success score across 145+ contracts and $1M+ earned.

## Services
- **Digital Marketing**: Automated content pipelines, AI-powered SEO audits, GEO optimization
- **Automation**: AI agents, workflow orchestration, chatbot development
- **Custom SaaS**: Full-stack Next.js applications, cloud infrastructure, MVP development

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://cyberworldbuilders.com
- Services: https://cyberworldbuilders.com/services
- Digital Marketing: https://cyberworldbuilders.com/services/digital-marketing
- Automation: https://cyberworldbuilders.com/services/automation

- Blog: https://cyberworldbuilders.com/blog
- Cemetery Software: https://cyberworldbuilders.com/cemetery-software

## Blog
The CyberWorld Builders blog covers AI agents, software engineering, automation, SEO, and building systems for service businesses. Posts are published regularly and available at https://cyberworldbuilders.com/blog.

## Location & Service Area
- Based in: Guntersville, Alabama (North Alabama / Tennessee Valley)
- Local service area: Huntsville, Decatur, Albertville, Scottsboro, and surrounding North Alabama
- Remote clients: Nationwide (USA) and international
- All work is delivered remotely — no on-site visits required

## Industries
- Plumbing and HVAC contractors
- Funeral homes and cemetery management
- Service businesses and trades
- Marketing agencies
- Regional businesses ready to automate
